name: 5ire
description: 5ire is a cross-platform desktop AI assistant, MCP client. It compatible with major service providers, supports local knowledge base and tools via model context protocol servers.

name: Dolt
description: Git for Data.

name: PAI
description: Resource scheduling and cluster management for AI.

name: Jax
description: Autograd and XLA for high-performance machine learning research.

name: DeepTeam
description: DeepTeam is a simple-to-use, open-source LLM red teaming framework, for penetration testing and safe guarding large-language model systems.

name: Registry Broker
description: Universal index and routing layer for AI agents. Aggregates agent metadata from multiple registries (NANDA, MCP, Virtuals, OpenRouter, A2A, X402 Bazaar) across web2 and web3, normalizes profiles, and provides protocol translation between agent ecosystems.

name: LeRobot
description: A central community library by Hugging Face for AI in robotics — end-to-end learning tools, data pipelines, and support for training/deploying VLA models.

name: DSPy
description: DSPy is the framework for programming—not prompting—language models. It allows you to iterate fast on building modular AI systems and offers algorithms for optimizing prompts and weights.

name: Alpaca-LoRA-Serve
description: Alpaca-LoRA as Chatbot service

name: Marqo
description: Tensor search for humans.

name: LangGraph
description: Build resilient language agents as graphs.

name: LakeFS
description: Git-like capabilities for your object storage.

name: OpenModelZ
description: One-click machine learning deployment (LLM, text-to-image and so on) at scale on any cluster (GCP, AWS, Lambda labs, your home lab, or even a single machine).

name: Forward
description: A library for high performance deep learning inference on NVIDIA GPUs.

name: ps-fuzz
description: ps-fuzz is a tool to test and harden GenAI system prompts against security vulnerabilities and adversarial attacks.

name: LUX
description: A Python library that facilitates fast and easy data exploration by automating the visualization and data analysis process.

name: OpenVLA
description: A 7B-parameter open-source Vision-Language-Action model trained on 970K+ robot demonstrations from the Open X-Embodiment dataset for generalist robotic manipulation.

name: PromptIDE
description: PromptIDE by xAI is an integrated development environment for prompt engineering and interpretability research, providing transparent access to Grok-1 with rich analytics and Python SDK support.

name: OME
description: OME is a Kubernetes operator for enterprise-grade management and serving of Large Language Models (LLMs)

name: Lancedb
description: Developer-friendly, serverless vector database for AI applications. Easily add long-term memory to your LLM apps!
